title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: core/context.py (第 226 至 667 行，共 667 行) ---
 226 |     async def compress(self, llm_summarizer_func, strategy: CompressionStrategy = None):
 227 |         """
 228 |         执行异步压缩逻辑（Phase 3 增强版）
 229 | 
 230 |         流程：
 231 |         1. 检查是否需要压缩（基于 messages 或 working_memory）
 232 |         2. 使用 CompressionEngine 选择压缩策略
 233 |         3. 执行压缩
 234 |         4. 存储摘要到三层记忆
 235 | 
 236 |         Args:
 237 |             llm_summarizer_func: 异步回调函数，接收 prompt，返回摘要文本
 238 |             strategy: 指定压缩策略（None 表示自动选择）
 239 | 
 240 |         Returns:
 241 |             bool: 是否执行了压缩
 242 |         """
 243 |         # 检查限制（支持 Phase 1, Phase 2, Phase 3）
 244 |         current_tokens = sum(len(str(msg)) for msg in self.messages)
 245 |         need_compress = current_tokens > self.max_history
 246 | 
 247 |         # Phase 2: 检查工作记忆是否需要压缩
 248 |         if self._enable_memory_layers and len(self.working_memory) >= self.working_memory.max_size:
 249 |             need_compress = True
 250 | 
 251 |         if not need_compress:
 252 |             return False
 253 | 
 254 |         print(f"\n[🧠 s06] 正在异步压缩上下文 (当前: {len(self.messages)}条)...")
 255 |         if self._enable_memory_layers:
 256 |             print(f"   [Phase 2] 工作记忆: {len(self.working_memory)}/{self.working_memory.max_size}")
 257 | 
 258 |         # Phase 3: 通过 MemoryManager 使用统一压缩入口
 259 |         async with self.messages_lock:
 260 |             source_messages = [dict(msg) if isinstance(msg, dict) else msg for msg in self.messages]
 261 | 
 262 |         result = await self.memory_manager.compress_messages(
 263 |             messages=source_messages,
 264 |             strategy=strategy,
 265 |             llm_summarizer_func=llm_summarizer_func,
 266 |             min_keep=self.min_keep,
 267 |             existing_summary=self.history_summary
 268 |         )
 269 | 
 270 |         if not result.success:
 271 |             print("   [Phase 3] 压缩失败")
 272 |             sanitized_messages = self.compression_engine._sanitize_openai_tool_pairs(source_messages)
 273 |             if sanitized_messages != source_messages:
 274 |                 async with self.messages_lock:
 275 |                     if self.messages[:len(source_messages)] == source_messages:
 276 |                         appended_messages = self.messages[len(source_messages):]
 277 |                         self.messages = sanitized_messages + appended_messages
 278 |                         if self._enable_memory_layers:
 279 |                             self.memory_manager.reset_working_memory(self.messages)
 280 |                         print("   [Phase 3] 压缩失败后已执行 OpenAI tool pair 安全清理")
 281 |             return False
 282 | 
 283 |         # 更新消息列表。注意：压缩期间可能有新消息被追加，不能用旧快照覆盖新消息。
 284 |         async with self.messages_lock:
 285 |             if self.messages[:len(source_messages)] == source_messages:
 286 |                 appended_messages = self.messages[len(source_messages):]
 287 |                 self.messages = result.compressed_messages + appended_messages
 288 |             else:
 289 |                 print("   [Phase 3] 检测到压缩期间消息被修改，跳过本次上下文替换")
 290 |                 return False
 291 | 
 292 |         # Phase 2: 同步更新工作记忆
 293 |         if self._enable_memory_layers:
 294 |             self.memory_manager.reset_working_memory(self.messages)
 295 | 
 296 |         # 如果有结构化摘要，存储到三层记忆
 297 |         if result.summary:
 298 |             # Phase 2: 添加到情景记忆
 299 |             if self._enable_memory_layers:
 300 |                 evicted_summary = self.memory_manager.save_summary(result.summary)
 301 | 
 302 |                 if evicted_summary:
 303 |                     print(f"   [Phase 2] 情景记忆已满，归档到长期记忆: {evicted_summary.session_id}")
 304 | 
 305 |                 print(f"   [Phase 2] 摘要已添加到情景记忆: {result.summary.session_id}")
 306 | 
 307 |             # 兼容 Phase 1: 存储到 session_summaries
 308 |             self.session_summaries.append(result.summary)
 309 | 
 310 |          ...

 301 | 
 302 |                 if evicted_summary:
 303 |                     print(f"   [Phase 2] 情景记忆已满，归档到长期记忆: {evicted_summary.session_id}")
 304 | 
 305 |                 print(f"   [Phase 2] 摘要已添加到情景记忆: {result.summary.session_id}")
 306 |
